description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a dark, nearly black exterior and a metallic sheen. The front of the can features a large, circular label with gold and cream accents, including stylized text and decorative elements such as a pair of crossed broomsticks and a foamy beer mug illustration. The label is bordered with a laurel wreath motif, and the text is set in a bold, vintage-style font. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull tab opening. The can's surface appears smooth and reflective, with no visible dents or damage. The overall design gives a premium, classic feel suitable for a specialty beverage.
description: A tall, dark aluminum can with a glossy finish and a detailed gold and cream label featuring vintage motifs and decorative graphics.
description_view_0: The can is mostly in shadow, with only the metallic top and faint label outline visible.
description_view_1: The front label is fully visible, showcasing the decorative gold and cream graphics and text.
description_view_2: The label is partially visible, with the edge of the main graphic and some text in view.
description_view_3: The can is mostly in shadow again, with minimal label detail visible and the metallic top slightly highlighted.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a circular design with gold and cream colors, vintage-style typography, and decorative elements such as a laurel wreath, crossed broomsticks, and a foamy mug illustration. The overall style is classic and ornate, with a premium feel.
